name: france-de-macron
description: Dashboard satirique & data-driven — French Cooked Index™

scripts.validate: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run typecheck:scripts && pnpm run lint && pnpm run format:check
scripts.db:types: pnpm dlx supabase@latest gen types typescript --local > apps/web/src/lib/supabase/database.types.ts.tmp && test -s apps/web/src/lib/supabase/database.types.ts.tmp && mv apps/web/src/lib/supabase/database.types.ts.tmp apps/web/src/lib/supabase/database.types.ts || (rm -f apps/web/src/lib/supabase/database.types.ts.tmp && echo 'db:types failed (local DB running?); database.types.ts unchanged' && exit 1)
scripts.db:types:linked: pnpm dlx supabase@latest gen types typescript --linked > apps/web/src/lib/supabase/database.types.ts.tmp && test -s apps/web/src/lib/supabase/database.types.ts.tmp && mv apps/web/src/lib/supabase/database.types.ts.tmp apps/web/src/lib/supabase/database.types.ts || (rm -f apps/web/src/lib/supabase/database.types.ts.tmp && echo 'db:types:linked failed; database.types.ts unchanged' && exit 1)
scripts.qa:phase7: pnpm run qa:reduced-motion && pnpm run qa:smoke && pnpm run qa:security-headers && pnpm run qa:meta-descriptions && pnpm run qa:electricity-unit && pnpm run qa:autonomous-datasets && pnpm run qa:lighthouse-cwv
